title: IT Automic automation specialist
description:
about the company.
A leading international financial institution providing a structured and reliable professional environment within its Singapore operations.

about the job.
This specialist position focuses on driving operational efficiency through the design and implementation of sophisticated workflow automation.

  • Collaborate with various technical departments to transform business requirements into streamlined automated scheduling tasks.

  • Architect and refine intricate process flows using enterprise-grade automation engines to support global banking standards.

  • Act as a primary consultant for system owners regarding best practices for lifecycle automation and technical workflows.

  • Execute service requests while maintaining rigorous oversight of change, release, and incident management protocols.

  • Analyze complex technical challenges to provide sustainable solutions that enhance overall system performance and reliability.

skills and experience required.

  • Minimum of 7 to 10 years of professional experience specializing in enterprise workflow development and job scheduling systems.

  • Proficient technical command of server-side technologies including various operating systems and scripting languages.

  • Demonstrated competency in managing high-pressure environments while maintaining focus on key performance indicators.

  • Strong background in technical requirement analysis, infrastructure planning, and cross-departmental coordination.

  • Excellent organizational skills with a focused approach toward structured delivery and operational excellence.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Vievien Nathan. (EA: 94C3609 )

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
